name: codebase-frontmatter-summary
description: Codex plugin for directory-by-directory codebase scanning that adds per-file frontmatter and writes one summary file per directory.

interface.shortDescription: Scan a tree, add per-file frontmatter, and write per-directory summaries
interface.longDescription: Use the Codebase Frontmatter Summary plugin to walk a repository bottom-up, generate concise summaries for each file, inject managed frontmatter where the file format supports it, and emit one summary document per directory that records direct child files and subdirectories.
defaultPrompt: Use the codebase-frontmatter-summary plugin to scan this project, refresh managed file frontmatter, and write directory summaries bottom-up.
